mapper.select: SELECT ca.id AS "application.id", ca.challenge_id AS "application.challengeId", ca.user_id AS "application.userId", ca.apply_time AS "application.applyTime", ca.status AS "application.status", ca.remark AS "application.remark", u.username, rf.file_url AS avatar FROM challenge_application ca JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN resource_file rf ON rf.biz_id = u.id AND rf.biz_type = 'AVATAR' WHERE ca.challenge_id = #{challengeId}
